data.name: WorkTeamDescription
data.value: Our work team brings together the twenty-year experience of those who have experienced the countless technological changes firsthand with the enthusiasm and desire for innovation of our youngest collaborators.
data.comment: Our work team brings together the twenty-year experience of those who have experienced countless technological changes first-hand with the enthusiasm and desire for innovation of our youngest collaborators.

data.name: WhoWeAreDescription
data.value: Ours are years of very rapid evolution of technologies related to communication. Smartphones, tablets, wearables and dedicated hardware are objects we use on a daily basis, and large-scale digital information has undeniably filled our lives.</br> We at Graldev are right there, in the midst of the whirling, very fast, heterogeneous flow of data and we make our contribution by developing software, services, apps and media.</br> Our work team brings together the twenty-year experience of those who have experienced the countless technological changes firsthand with the enthusiasm and desire for innovation of our youngest collaborators.
data.comment: Ours are years of very rapid evolution of communication-related technologies. Smartphones, tablets, wearables and dedicated hardware are objects we use every day and large-scale digital information has undeniably filled our lives.</br> We at Graldev are right there, in the midst of the swirling, very fast, heterogeneous flow of data and we give our contribution by developing software, services, apps and media.</br> Our work team brings together the twenty-year experience of those who have experienced countless technological changes first-hand with the enthusiasm and desire for innovation of our youngest collaborators.

data.name: TellUsAboutYourIdea
data.value: Do you have a project to carry out? </br> Do you want to work with us? </br> Send a request!
data.comment: Do you have a project to carry out?</br>Do you want to work with us?</br>Send a request!

data.name: GraldevMission
data.value: Graldev's Mission is to accompany the customer on the path between an idea and its realization, providing adequate support before, during and after development.
data.comment: Graldev's Mission is to accompany the customer on the path between an idea and its realization, providing adequate support before, during and after development.

data.name: LudirexDescription
data.value: Ludirex (beta) is the social platform conceived and created, in collaboration with Ludirex Srl, as a meeting point for players looking for companions or teams to play online. </br> Register now!
data.comment: Ludirex (beta) is the social platform designed and created, in collaboration with Ludirex Srl, as a meeting point for players looking for teammates or teams to play online.</br>Register now!

data.name: MessageSent
data.value: The message has been sent, thank you!
data.comment: Your message has been sent. Thank you!

data.name: NewProfessionalsDescriptions
data.value:
We are looking for a Software Developer who has the following characteristics:

Knowledge of one or more of the following programming languages
-C#
-Java
-Angular
Knowledge of Web framework based on Javascript
Knowledge of Web API REST
Services Experience with SQL Server and MySQL
Relational databases Knowledge and use of GIT
Propensity to Team work

For your application use ours Contacts Form
data.comment:
We are looking for a Software Developer who has the following characteristics:

Knowledge of one or more of the following programming languages
-C#
-Java
-Angular
Knowledge of Javascript-based Web frameworks Knowledge of Web API REST
services Experience with SQL SERVER and MySQL
relational databases Knowledge and use of GIT
Propensity to team work

To apply, use our Contact form

data.name: NewProfessionalsTitle
data.value: We are looking for New professionals to be included in our staff!
data.comment: We are looking for New professional figures to join our staff!

data.name: OurProjectDescription
data.value: The best way to understand how we can help you is ... to see and experience what we have already done and to know what our customers think!
data.comment: The best way to understand how we can help you is... to see and try what we have already created and know what our customers think!

data.name: OurProjectTitle
data.value: Take a look at our latest Software Projects

data.name: ParcorDescription
data.value: Parcor is the web app that we are creating for the Segni Project, a project relating to the world of intercompany nurseries and of which Graldev is a technological partner. An application that will allow users to always be informed about news and to interact with other users, organizations and companies involved.
data.comment: Parcor is the web app we are creating for the Segni Project, a project relating to the world of Inter-company nurseries and of which Graldev is the technological partner. An application that will allow users to always be informed about news and to be able to interact with other users, organizations and companies involved.

data.name: SofwareAndWebServicesDescription
data.value: We design and create complete enterprise software solutions. We create automatic services and processes for all types of communication.
data.comment: We design and create complete software solutions in the Enterprise field. We create automatic services and processes for every type of communication.

data.name: SupportAndAdviceDescription
data.value: We provide consultancy on software architecture to realize the idea and assistance in the use of our products with the necessary maintenance.
data.comment: We provide consultancy on the software architecture to realize the idea and assistance in the use of our products with the necessary maintenance.

data.name: GeordieDescription
data.value: Geordie is our solution to help you manage your online sales. </br> Access your stores in an organized and simple way with this highly customizable tool based on your needs
data.comment: Geordie is our solution to help you manage online sales. </br> Access your stores in an organized and simple way with this highly customizable tool based on your needs

data.name: CrossPlatformAppDescription
data.value: We integrate the systems with the ad hoc creation of native and web based apps for smartphones, tablets, wearables and for all "smart" devices.
data.comment: We integrate the systems with the ad hoc creation of native and web based apps for smartphones, tablets, wearables and all "smart" devices.

data.name: ARAppDevelopmentDescription
data.value: Gralcall is Graldev's answer to the Augmented Reality requests of our customers and partners. Gralcall is software that can be adapted down to the smallest detail. </br> Try it now and then visit the dedicated page for more information
data.comment: Gralcall is Graldev's response to the Augmented Reality requests of our customers and partners. Gralcall is a software that is adaptable down to the smallest details. </br>

data.name: ITConsultingDescription
data.value:
Do you have a project you want to realize but don't know where to start?
Contact us!
We will help you find the most suitable solution to realize your idea.

data.name: AI_ContentDescription
data.value:
We harness the power of Artificial Intelligence to create high-quality multimedia content tailored to your communication and digital needs.

Whether it's engaging videos, audio content, or dynamic integrations, we leverage advanced AI technologies to speed up production and deliver professional results quickly.

Contact us for a DEMO — we’ll show you how we can enhance your brand with smart, automated, and creative solutions.


Some examples:

  • 🧠 Creation of explainer videos for services, products, or educational projects
  • 🧠 Content creation for blog articles, images, and social media campaigns

data.name: AI_API_Description
data.value:
We bring Artificial Intelligence into your software!

We build applications that learn, adapt, and deliver personalized user experiences.
Our custom solutions combine traditional technologies and AI to improve efficiency, simplify interactions, and enhance digital content.

Curious about what we can build for you?
Get in touch and request a personalized DEMO!


A real example:

  • 🍷Vitinerario is your personal sommelier app powered by Artificial Intelligence.
    It suggests the perfect wine, answers your questions, and enriches your wine experience in real time.

👉 Learn more
